crossRefs.label: Right side front splash guard removal

items: If the belt is replaced with a new one, adjustments and inspections shall be made when the belt is replaced with a new one.

Belt inspection and adjustment should be performed when the engine is cold. In the warm-up condition, the distance between each pulley shaft is elongated, and even if the belt is adjusted to the standard tension value in that condition, the distance between the shafts shrinks when the engine is cold, resulting in a decrease in tension.

blocks.text: 2. Right side front splash guard removal

refs.label: Right side front splash guard removal

blocks.text: A.C. Generator Inspect the belt for damage and remove any damaged Exchange. The following is a list of the most common problems with the Inspect the belt tension or deflection and adjust the belt tension if it is outside the standard value.

Install the belt tension gauge (07JGG-0010101) and inspect the belt tension. Belt tension When belt is reused Reference value 196－294N（20－30kgf） When new belt is replaced:. Reference value 540－638N（55－65kgf）

items: Do not rotate the crankshaft pulley during inspection.
Always use a belt tension gauge.
Refer to the instruction manual for the gauge for belt tension gauge usage.
When installing, removing, and measuring belt tension gauges, as far as possible, the belt tension gauges should not be placed against any object other than the belt.
The reset button must not touch any other parts of the belt when it is removed from the belt because of the position hand system.
When a remote cable is used for measurement, it should be free from unreasonable bends.

blocks.text: Inspect the amount of deflection when the center portion (A) between the pulleys is pressed with a force of 98 N (10 kgf). Belt deflection When belt is reused Reference value 10.5－11.5mm/98N（10kgf） When new belt is replaced:. Reference value 6－7mm/98N（10kgf）

items: Do not rotate the crankshaft pulley during inspection.
Push-pull gauges should be used for measurement.

items.text: Do not rotate the crankshaft pulley during inspection.
Do not rotate the crankshaft pulley during inspection.
Push-pull gauges should be used for measurement.
Push-pull gauges should be used for measurement.

blocks.text: Loosen the two lock bolts (A) on the A.C. generator, adjust the belt tension with a handy bar (KTC LZ2-600), and tighten the lock bolts to the specified torque.

items: Never turn the crankshaft pulley during adjustment.
When re-measuring after adjusting the belt tension, be sure to turn the crankshaft pulley clockwise 1-2 revolutions before measurement.
